Although prior work shows that personality-driven Large Language Model (LLM) agents can improve behavioural diversity and test coverage, existing tools largely remain research prototypes and lack cross-game reusability.
  This tool paper presents MIMIC-Py, a Python-based automated game-testing tool that transforms personality-driven LLM agents into a reusable and extensible framework. MIMIC-Py exposes personality traits as configurable inputs and adopts a modular architecture that decouples planning, execution, and memory from game-specific logic. It supports multiple interaction mechanisms, enabling agents to interact with games via exposed APIs or synthesized code. We describe the design of MIMIC-Py and show how it enables deployment to new game environments with minimal engineering effort, bridging the gap between research prototypes and practical automated game testing.
  The source code and a demo video are available on our project webpage: https://mimic-persona.github.io/MIMIC-Py-Home-Page/.

</details>


### [330] [Toward Generalizable Graph Learning for 3D Engineering AI: Explainable Workflows for CAE Mode Shape Classification and CFD Field Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07781)
*Tong Duy Son,Kohta Sugiura,Marc Brughmans,Andrey Hense,Zhihao Liu,Amirthalakshmi Veeraraghavan,Ajinkya Bhave,Jay Masters,Paolo di Carlo,Theo Geluk*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一个实用的图学习框架，将异构3D工程数据转换为物理感知图表示，用于汽车工程中的CAE振动模式分类和CFD空气动力学场预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汽车工程开发面临缩短周期、提高性能的压力，现有AI方法多为任务特定、难以解释且难以跨阶段重用。需要一种可解释、可重用的工程AI框架来处理异构3D数据。

Method: 将异构工程资产（FE模型、BiW表示、CAD几何、CFD网格）转换为物理感知图表示，使用图神经网络处理。支持分类和预测任务，包含区域感知BiW图和物理信息代理等具体技术。

Result: 在CAE振动模式分类中实现可解释的分类；在CFD空气动力学场预测中准确预测压力和壁面剪切应力，同时通过对称保持下采样降低计算成本。提供数据生成指导。

Conclusion: 该框架为CAE和CFD决策支持提供了实用、可重用的工程AI工作流程，提高了可信度。

Abstract: Automotive engineering development increasingly relies on heterogeneous 3D data, including finite element (FE) models, body-in-white (BiW) representations, CAD geometry, and CFD meshes. At the same time, engineering teams face growing pressure to shorten development cycles, improve performance and accelerate innovation. Although artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly explored in this domain, many current methods remain task-specific, difficult to interpret, and hard to reuse across development stages. This paper presents a practical graph learning framework for 3D engineering AI, in which heterogeneous engineering assets are converted into physics-aware graph representations and processed by Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). The framework is designed to support both classification and prediction tasks. The framework is validated on two automotive applications: CAE vibration mode shape classification and CFD aerodynamic field prediction. For CAE vibration mode classification, a region-aware BiW graph supports explainable mode classification across vehicle and FE variants under label scarcity. For CFD aerodynamic field prediction, a physics-informed surrogate predicts pressure and wall shear stress (WSS) across aerodynamic body shape variants, while symmetry preserving down sampling retains accuracy with lower computational cost. The framework also outlines data generation guidance that can help engineers identify which additional simulations or labels are valuable to collect next. These results demonstrate a practical and reusable engineering AI workflow for more trustworthy CAE and CFD decision support.

</details>


### [331] [SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08544)
*Yunsong Zhou,Hangxu Liu,Xuekun Jiang,Xing Shen,Yuanzhen Zhou,Hui Wang,Baole Fang,Yang Tian,Mulin Yu,Qiaojun Yu,Li Ma,Hengjie Li,Hanqing Wang,Jia Zeng,Jiangmiao Pang*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: SIM1：一个物理对齐的真实-仿真-真实数据引擎，通过将仿真与物理世界对齐，为可变形物体操作提供可扩展的监督学习，显著减少对真实数据的需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于刚体抽象的仿真到真实迁移方法在处理可变形物体（如布料）时存在几何不匹配、软体动力学脆弱、运动原语不适用等问题。作者认为仿真失败的原因不是合成数据本身，而是仿真缺乏物理基础。

Method: SIM1系统：1）给定有限演示，将场景数字化为度量一致的双胞胎；2）通过弹性建模校准可变形动力学；3）使用基于扩散的轨迹生成和质量过滤扩展行为。该管道将稀疏观察转化为具有接近演示保真度的规模化合成监督。

Result: 在纯合成数据上训练的策略在1:15的等价比下达到与真实数据基线相当的性能，在真实世界部署中实现90%的零样本成功率和50%的泛化增益。

Conclusion: 物理对齐的仿真为可变形物体操作提供了可扩展的监督学习，是实现数据高效策略学习的实用途径。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation with deformable objects represents a data-intensive regime in embodied learning, where shape, contact, and topology co-evolve in ways that far exceed the variability of rigids. Although simulation promises relief from the cost of real-world data acquisition, prevailing sim-to-real pipelines remain rooted in rigid-body abstractions, producing mismatched geometry, fragile soft dynamics, and motion primitives poorly suited for cloth interaction. We posit that simulation fails not for being synthetic, but for being ungrounded. To address this, we introduce SIM1, a physics-aligned real-to-sim-to-real data engine that grounds simulation in the physical world. Given limited demonstrations, the system digitizes scenes into metric-consistent twins, calibrates deformable dynamics through elastic modeling, and expands behaviors via diffusion-based trajectory generation with quality filtering. This pipeline transforms sparse observations into scaled synthetic supervision with near-demonstration fidelity. Experiments show that policies trained on purely synthetic data achieve parity with real-data baselines at a 1:15 equivalence ratio, while delivering 90% zero-shot success and 50% generalization gains in real-world deployment. These results validate physics-aligned simulation as scalable supervision for deformable manipulation and a practical pathway for data-efficient policy learning.

</details>


### [332] [Incremental Residual Reinforcement Learning Toward Real-World Learning for Social Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07945)
*Haruto Nagahisa,Kohei Matsumoto,Yuki Tomita,Yuki Hyodo,Ryo Kurazume*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: IRRL（增量残差强化学习）结合增量学习和残差强化学习，使移动机器人能够在真实世界中高效学习社会导航，无需回放缓冲区，适应不同地区的社会规范差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社会导航对移动机器人至关重要，但不同地区的行人动态和社会规范差异很大，模拟无法覆盖所有真实场景。真实世界RL有潜力解决这个问题，但面临边缘设备计算资源有限和学习效率低的挑战。

Method: 提出增量残差强化学习（IRRL），结合两种技术：1）增量学习（轻量级过程，无需回放缓冲区或批量更新）；2）残差强化学习（仅针对基础策略的残差进行训练，提高学习效率）。

Result: 模拟实验显示，尽管没有回放缓冲区，IRRL性能与传统的基于回放缓冲区的方法相当，并优于现有的增量学习方法。真实世界实验证实IRRL能使机器人通过真实世界学习有效适应未见过的环境。

Conclusion: IRRL为移动机器人的社会导航提供了一种有效的真实世界强化学习方法，解决了计算资源限制和学习效率问题，使机器人能够适应不同地区的社会规范差异。

Abstract: As the demand for mobile robots continues to increase, social navigation has emerged as a critical task, driving active research into deep reinforcement learning (RL) approaches. However, because pedestrian dynamics and social conventions vary widely across different regions, simulations cannot easily encompass all possible real-world scenarios. Real-world RL, in which agents learn while operating directly in physical environments, presents a promising solution to this issue. Nevertheless, this approach faces significant challenges, particularly regarding constrained computational resources on edge devices and learning efficiency. In this study, we propose incremental residual RL (IRRL). This method integrates incremental learning, which is a lightweight process that operates without a replay buffer or batch updates, with residual RL, which enhances learning efficiency by training only on the residuals relative to a base policy. Through the simulation experiments, we demonstrated that, despite lacking a replay buffer, IRRL achieved performance comparable to those of conventional replay buffer-based methods and outperformed existing incremental learning approaches. Furthermore, the real-world experiments confirmed that IRRL can enable robots to effectively adapt to previously unseen environments through the real-world learning.

</details>


### [333] [Show Me the Infographic I Imagine: Intent-Aware Infographic Retrieval for Authoring Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07989)
*Jing Xu,Jiarui Hu,Zhihao Shuai,Yiyun Chen,Weikai Yang*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 开发了一个意图感知的信息图检索框架，通过意图分类和查询增强来改善信息图检索质量，支持用户基于检索结果进行高效创作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信息图创作对新手用户具有挑战性，现有检索方法（基于关键词或通用视觉语言模型）难以捕捉用户的设计意图，因为信息图具有文本密集、多组件的复杂视觉设计特点

Method: 1) 通过形成性研究建立信息图描述意图分类法；2) 利用该分类法增强和精炼用户自由形式查询；3) 基于检索结果开发交互式代理支持高级编辑意图到低级适配的转换

Result: 定量评估和用户研究表明，该方法在检索质量上优于基线方法，能更好地满足用户意图并支持高效的信息图创作

Conclusion: 意图感知的信息图检索框架能有效弥合用户模糊自然语言查询与复杂信息图设计之间的鸿沟，降低信息图创作门槛

Abstract: While infographics have become a powerful medium for communicating data-driven stories, authoring them from scratch remains challenging, especially for novice users. Retrieving relevant exemplars from a large corpus can provide design inspiration and promote reuse, substantially lowering the barrier to infographic authoring. However, effective retrieval is difficult because users often express design intent in ambiguous natural language, while infographics embody rich and multi-faceted visual designs. As a result, keyword-based search often fails to capture design intent, and general-purpose vision-language retrieval models trained on natural images are ill-suited to the text-heavy, multi-component nature of infographics. To address these challenges, we develop an intent-aware infographic retrieval framework that better aligns user queries with infographic designs. We first conduct a formative study of how people describe infographics and derive an intent taxonomy spanning content and visual design facets. This taxonomy is then leveraged to enrich and refine free-form user queries, guiding the retrieval process with intent-specific cues. Building on the retrieved exemplars, users can adapt the designs to their own data with high-level edit intents, supported by an interactive agent that performs low-level adaptation. Both quantitative evaluations and user studies are conducted to demonstrate that our method improves retrieval quality over baseline methods while better supporting intent satisfaction and efficient infographic authoring.

</details>


### [334] [Multi-Modal Learning meets Genetic Programming: Analyzing Alignment in Latent Space Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08324)
*Benjamin Léger,Kazem Meidani,Christian Gagné*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: SNIP模型声称通过符号-数值双模态对齐实现符号回归，但研究发现其跨模态对齐过于粗糙，无法有效指导符号空间搜索，多模态潜在空间优化的潜力尚未实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 符号回归传统上使用遗传编程进行组合搜索，潜在空间优化方法通过神经编码器将符号表达式映射到连续空间。SNIP模型引入多模态方法，对齐符号和数值编码器，但现有类似模型（如CLIP）显示这种对齐通常是粗粒度的。本文旨在验证SNIP是否真正实现了有效的双模态优化。

Method: 通过实验分析SNIP模型在符号回归任务中的表现，特别关注：(1) 优化过程中跨模态对齐是否改善，(2) SNIP学习的对齐是否足够精细以指导符号空间搜索。

Result: 实验结果显示：(1) 即使适应度提高，跨模态对齐在优化过程中并未改善；(2) SNIP学习的对齐过于粗糙，无法在符号空间中进行有效的原则性搜索。

Conclusion: 虽然多模态潜在空间优化在符号回归中具有显著潜力，但有效的对齐引导优化在实践中尚未实现，细粒度对齐是未来工作的关键方向。

Abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) aims to discover mathematical expressions from data, a task traditionally tackled using Genetic Programming (GP) through combinatorial search over symbolic structures. Latent Space Optimization (LSO) methods use neural encoders to map symbolic expressions into continuous spaces, transforming the combinatorial search into continuous optimization. SNIP (Meidani et al., 2024), a contrastive pre-training model inspired by CLIP, advances LSO by introducing a multi-modal approach: aligning symbolic and numeric encoders in a shared latent space to learn the phenotype-genotype mapping, enabling optimization in the numeric space to implicitly guide symbolic search. However, this relies on fine-grained cross-modal alignment, whereas literature on similar models like CLIP reveals that such an alignment is typically coarse-grained. In this paper, we investigate whether SNIP delivers on its promise of effective bi-modal optimization for SR. Our experiments show that: (1) cross-modal alignment does not improve during optimization, even as fitness increases, and (2) the alignment learned by SNIP is too coarse to efficiently conduct principled search in the symbolic space. These findings reveal that while multi-modal LSO holds significant potential for SR, effective alignment-guided optimization remains unrealized in practice, highlighting fine-grained alignment as a critical direction for future work.

</details>


### [335] [Selective Attention System (SAS): Device-Addressed Speech Detection for Real-Time On-Device Voice AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08412)
*David Joohun Kim,Daniyal Anjum,Bonny Banerjee,Omar Abbasi*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种用于边缘设备部署的序列化设备寻址路由（SDAR）方法，通过选择性注意力系统（SAS）在多说话人环境中基于交互历史进行音频路由决策，而非单次话语分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在ASR前边缘部署场景中，需要在严格延迟和计算限制下决定是否转发音频进行转录。多说话人环境中时间模糊的话语使得传统单次话语分类方法效果有限，需要建模为基于交互历史的序列路由问题。

Method: 提出序列化设备寻址路由（SDAR）框架，实现选择性注意力系统（SAS）在设备端运行。系统利用因果交互历史进行决策，支持纯音频和音视频融合配置，在ARM Cortex-A级硬件上实现低延迟（<150ms）和小内存占用（<20MB）。

Result: 在60小时多说话人英语测试集上，纯音频配置F1=0.86（精度0.89，召回0.83）；音视频融合提升至F1=0.95（精度0.97，召回0.93）。移除交互历史使F1从0.95降至0.57±0.03，显示交互历史信息的重要性。

Conclusion: 在多说话人边缘部署场景中，将设备寻址检测建模为序列路由问题比单次话语分类更有效，交互历史包含关键决策信息。SAS系统在资源受限设备上实现了高效部署。

Abstract: We study device-addressed speech detection under pre-ASR edge deployment constraints, where systems must decide whether to forward audio before transcription under strict latency and compute limits. We show that, in multi-speaker environments with temporally ambiguous utterances, this task is more effectively modelled as a sequential routing problem over interaction history than as an utterance-local classification task. We formalize this as Sequential Device-Addressed Routing (SDAR) and present the Selective Attention System (SAS), an on-device implementation that instantiates this formulation.
  On a held-out 60-hour multi-speaker English test set, the primary audio-only configuration achieves F1=0.86 (precision=0.89, recall=0.83); with an optional camera, audio+video fusion raises F1 to 0.95 (precision=0.97, recall=0.93). Removing causal interaction history (Stage~3) reduced F1 from 0.95 to 0.57+/-0.03 in the audio+video configuration under our evaluation protocol. Among the tested components, this was the largest observed ablation effect, indicating that short-horizon interaction history carries substantial decision-relevant information in the evaluated setting. SAS runs fully on-device on ARM Cortex-A class hardware (<150 ms latency, <20 MB footprint). All results are from internal evaluation on a proprietary dataset evaluated primarily in English; a 5-hour evaluation subset may be shared for independent verification (Section 8.8).

</details>


### [336] [Exploring Temporal Representation in Neural Processes for Multimodal Action Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08418)
*Marco Gabriele Fedozzi,Yukie Nagai,Francesco Rea,Alessandra Sciutti*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究将条件神经过程（CNP）应用于机器人多模态动作预测，受人类镜像神经元系统启发，提出改进的DMBN-PTE模型以增强时间表示能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受人类理解和预测他人行为能力的启发，研究将条件神经过程应用于机器人自监督多模态动作预测。基于镜像神经元系统发育的研究成果，聚焦于自我动作预测这一初步目标。

Method: 采用现有的深度模态融合网络（DMBN），利用CNP的概率生成能力重建部分观测动作序列中的视觉-运动感觉信号。发现其在时间表示上的局限性后，提出改进版本DMBN-PTE，引入位置时间编码以学习更鲁棒的时间表示。

Result: DMBN模型能够重建视觉-运动感觉信号，但在未见动作序列上泛化困难。DMBN-PTE通过改进时间表示，初步显示出在扩展架构适用性方面的有效性。

Conclusion: DMBN-PTE是开发能够自主学习在更长时间尺度上预测动作的机器人系统的第一步，能够利用新观测不断优化预测。

Abstract: Inspired by the human ability to understand and predict others, we study the applicability of Conditional Neural Processes (CNP) to the task of self-supervised multimodal action prediction in robotics. Following recent results regarding the ontogeny of the Mirror Neuron System (MNS), we focus on the preliminary objective of self-actions prediction. We find a good MNS-inspired model in the existing Deep Modality Blending Network (DMBN), able to reconstruct the visuo-motor sensory signal during a partially observed action sequence by leveraging the probabilistic generation of CNP. After a qualitative and quantitative evaluation, we highlight its difficulties in generalizing to unseen action sequences, and identify the cause in its inner representation of time. Therefore, we propose a revised version, termed DMBN-Positional Time Encoding (DMBN-PTE), that facilitates learning a more robust representation of temporal information, and provide preliminary results of its effectiveness in expanding the applicability of the architecture. DMBN-PTE figures as a first step in the development of robotic systems that autonomously learn to forecast actions on longer time scales refining their predictions with incoming observations.

</details>


### [337] [Small-scale photonic Kolmogorov-Arnold networks using standard telecom nonlinear modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08432)
*Luca Nogueira Calçado,Sergei K. Turitsyn,Egor Manuylovich*

Main category: physics.optics

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种全光实现的Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（SSP-KANs），使用标准电信组件构建可训练非线性模块，在分类、回归和图像识别任务中实现高性能非线性推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有光子神经网络大多依赖线性光学网格和电子非线性，重新引入光-电-光转换瓶颈。需要实现完全光学的非线性推理，避免光电转换延迟。

Method: 使用标准电信组件（马赫-曾德尔干涉仪、半导体光放大器、可变光衰减器）构建可训练非线性模块，形成四参数传递函数。采用完全可微物理模型进行端到端优化。

Result: 仅用少量光学模块的SSP-KANs在非线性分类、回归和图像识别任务中表现优异，接近软件基线但参数更少。四模块网络在非线性分类基准上达到98.4%准确率，对硬件损伤具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该工作为使用商用电信硬件实现光子KANs提供了从仿真到实验演示的实用途径，展示了全光非线性推理的可行性。

Abstract: Photonic neural networks promise ultrafast inference, yet most architectures rely on linear optical meshes with electronic nonlinearities, reintroducing optical-electrical-optical bottlenecks. Here we introduce small-scale photonic Kolmogorov-Arnold networks (SSP-KANs) implemented entirely with standard telecommunications components. Each network edge employs a trainable nonlinear module composed of a Mach-Zehnder interferometer, semiconductor optical amplifier, and variable optical attenuators, providing a four-parameter transfer function derived from gain saturation and interferometric mixing. Despite this constrained expressivity, SSP-KANs comprising only a few optical modules achieve strong nonlinear inference performance across classification, regression, and image recognition tasks, approaching software baselines with significantly fewer parameters. A four-module network achieves 98.4\% accuracy on nonlinear classification benchmarks inaccessible to linear models. Performance remains robust under realistic hardware impairments, maintaining high accuracy down to 6-bit input resolution and 14 dB signal-to-noise ratio. By using a fully differentiable physics model for end-to-end optimisation of optical parameters, this work establishes a practical pathway from simulation to experimental demonstration of photonic KANs using commodity telecom hardware.

</details>


### [338] [Evaluating Counterfactual Explanation Methods on Incomplete Inputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08004)
*Francesco Leofante,Daniel Neider,Mustafa Yalçıner*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文系统评估了在输入数据不完整（存在缺失值）情况下，现有反事实解释生成方法的有效性，发现所有方法都难以找到有效的反事实解释，需要开发能处理不完整输入的新方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界数据经常包含缺失值，但现有反事实解释生成方法通常假设输入完全指定，这些方法在不完整输入下的性能影响尚未被探索。

Method: 系统评估近期反事实解释生成方法在输入不完整时提供有效且合理反事实的能力，假设鲁棒的反事实解释方法能更好地应对这一挑战。

Result: 鲁棒方法比非鲁棒方法获得更高的有效性，但所有方法都难以找到有效的反事实解释。

Conclusion: 需要开发能够处理不完整输入的新反事实解释方法。

Abstract: Existing algorithms for generating Counterfactual Explanations (CXs) for Machine Learning (ML) typically assume fully specified inputs. However, real-world data often contains missing values, and the impact of these incomplete inputs on the performance of existing CX methods remains unexplored. To address this gap, we systematically evaluate recent CX generation methods on their ability to provide valid and plausible counterfactuals when inputs are incomplete. As part of this investigation, we hypothesize that robust CX generation methods will be better suited to address the challenge of providing valid and plausible counterfactuals when inputs are incomplete. Our findings reveal that while robust CX methods achieve higher validity than non-robust ones, all methods struggle to find valid counterfactuals. These results motivate the need for new CX methods capable of handling incomplete inputs.

</details>


### [339] [When Switching Algorithms Helps: A Theoretical Study of Online Algorithm Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07473)
*Denis Antipov,Carola Doerr*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文首次从理论上证明了在线算法选择（OAS）在OneMax问题上能获得渐进加速，通过切换(1+λ) EA和(1+(λ,λ)) GA算法，达到O(n log log n)期望时间，优于单独使用任一算法的最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管在线算法选择（OAS）在实证研究中表现出色，但缺乏理论证明其能带来渐进加速。现有理论指导算法切换的时机和方法也基本缺失，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 研究两种进化算法：(1+λ) EA和(1+(λ,λ)) GA在OneMax问题上的切换策略。首先在理想切换规则下分析性能，然后提出实际可行的切换策略，结合固定起点和固定目标视角分析不同算法在不同优化阶段的优势。

Result: 通过适当选择两种算法的种群规模，在OneMax问题上达到O(n log log n)期望时间，优于单独使用任一算法的最优性能Θ(n√(log n log log log n/log log n))。实际切换策略能达到与理想切换相同的性能。

Conclusion: 这是首个理论证明在线算法选择能带来渐进加速的例子，展示了不同算法在不同优化阶段的优势互补。为深入理解OAS提供了有前景的理论路径。

Abstract: Online algorithm selection (OAS) aims to adapt the optimization process to changes in the fitness landscape and is expected to outperform any single algorithm from a given portfolio. Although this expectation is supported by numerous empirical studies, there are currently no theoretical results proving that OAS can yield asymptotic speedups (apart from some artificial examples for hyper-heuristics). Moreover, theory-based guidelines for when and how to switch between algorithms are largely missing.
  In this paper, we present the first theoretical example in which switching between two algorithms -- the $(1+λ)$ EA and the $(1+(λ,λ))$ GA -- solves the OneMax problem asymptotically faster than either algorithm used in isolation. We show that an appropriate choice of population sizes for the two algorithms allows the optimum to be reached in $O(n\log\log n)$ expected time, faster than the $Θ(n\sqrt{\frac{\log n \log\log\log n}{\log\log n}})$ runtime of the best of these two algorithms with optimally tuned parameters.
  We first establish this bound under an idealized switching rule that changes from the $(1+λ)$ to the $(1+(λ,λ))$ GA at the optimal time. We then propose a realistic switching strategy that achieves the same performance. Our analysis combines fixed-start and fixed-target perspectives, illustrating how different algorithms dominate at different stages of the optimization process. This approach offers a promising path toward a deeper theoretical understanding of OAS.

</details>


### [340] [Exponential quantum advantage in processing massive classical data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07639)
*Haimeng Zhao,Alexander Zlokapa,Hartmut Neven,Ryan Babbush,John Preskill,Jarrod R. McClean,Hsin-Yuan Huang*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文证明小型量子计算机（仅需多对数规模）能在经典数据处理和机器学习中实现量子优势，相比经典机器可减少4-6个数量级的规模，仅需不到60个逻辑量子比特。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索量子计算在经典数据处理和机器学习中的广泛应用优势，解决量子优势在实用场景中的根本性问题，特别是在大规模分类和降维任务中。

Method: 提出量子oracle sketching算法，通过量子叠加态访问经典世界，仅使用随机经典数据样本。结合经典阴影技术，绕过数据加载和读取瓶颈，从海量经典数据构建简洁的经典模型。

Result: 在单细胞RNA测序和电影评论情感分析等实际应用中验证量子优势，实现4-6个数量级的规模缩减，仅需不到60个逻辑量子比特。证明经典机器需要指数级更大规模才能达到相同预测性能。

Conclusion: 经典数据上的机器学习是量子优势的广泛自然领域，也是量子力学在复杂性前沿的基本测试。即使经典机器拥有无限时间或BPP=BQP，这些量子优势仍然存在。

Abstract: Broadly applicable quantum advantage, particularly in classical data processing and machine learning, has been a fundamental open problem. In this work, we prove that a small quantum computer of polylogarithmic size can perform large-scale classification and dimension reduction on massive classical data by processing samples on the fly, whereas any classical machine achieving the same prediction performance requires exponentially larger size. Furthermore, classical machines that are exponentially larger yet below the required size need superpolynomially more samples and time. We validate these quantum advantages in real-world applications, including single-cell RNA sequencing and movie review sentiment analysis, demonstrating four to six orders of magnitude reduction in size with fewer than 60 logical qubits. These quantum advantages are enabled by quantum oracle sketching, an algorithm for accessing the classical world in quantum superposition using only random classical data samples. Combined with classical shadows, our algorithm circumvents the data loading and readout bottleneck to construct succinct classical models from massive classical data, a task provably impossible for any classical machine that is not exponentially larger than the quantum machine. These quantum advantages persist even when classical machines are granted unlimited time or if BPP=BQP, and rely only on the correctness of quantum mechanics. Together, our results establish machine learning on classical data as a broad and natural domain of quantum advantage and a fundamental test of quantum mechanics at the complexity frontier.

</details>


### [341] [HistDiT: A Structure-Aware Latent Conditional Diffusion Model for High-Fidelity Virtual Staining in Histopathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08305)
*Aasim Bin Saleem,Amr Ahmed,Ardhendu Behera,Hafeezullah Amin,Iman Yi Liao,Mahmoud Khattab,Pan Jia Wern,Haslina Makmur*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出HistDiT，一种用于虚拟组织化学染色的新型潜在条件扩散Transformer架构，通过双流条件策略和多目标损失函数，在保持细胞结构的同时准确翻译生化表达，显著提升了虚拟染色的视觉保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组织化学染色（IHC）对于评估乳腺癌等疾病中的特定免疫生物标志物至关重要，但传统染色方法资源密集、耗时且易造成结构损伤。虚拟染色作为可扩展的替代方案，面临在保持细粒度细胞结构的同时准确翻译生化表达的挑战。现有基于GAN或卷积U-Net扩散模型的方法存在"结构与染色权衡"问题，生成的样本要么结构相关但模糊，要么纹理真实但存在影响诊断使用的伪影。

Method: 提出HistDiT，一种新型潜在条件扩散Transformer架构，包含三个关键创新：1）双流条件策略，通过VAE编码的潜在空间保持空间约束，通过UNI嵌入提供语义表型指导；2）多目标损失函数，有助于生成具有清晰形态结构的锐利图像；3）使用结构相关性度量（SCM）专注于核心形态结构，精确评估样本质量。

Result: 该模型在严格的定量和定性评估中优于现有基线方法，为虚拟组织学染色建立了新的视觉保真度基准。

Conclusion: HistDiT通过创新的双流条件策略和多目标损失函数，成功解决了虚拟染色中的"结构与染色权衡"问题，为组织病理学中的虚拟染色提供了更准确、可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Immunohistochemistry (IHC) is essential for assessing specific immune biomarkers like Human Epidermal growth-factor Receptor 2 (HER2) in breast cancer. However, the traditional protocols of obtaining IHC stains are resource-intensive, time-consuming, and prone to structural damages. Virtual staining has emerged as a scalable alternative, but it faces significant challenges in preserving fine-grained cellular structures while accurately translating biochemical expressions. Current state-of-the-art methods still rely on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or standard convolutional U-Net diffusion models that often struggle with "structure and staining trade-offs". The generated samples are either structurally relevant but blurry, or texturally realistic but have artifacts that compromise their diagnostic use. In this paper, we introduce HistDiT, a novel latent conditional Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that establishes a new benchmark for visual fidelity in virtual histological staining. The novelty introduced in this work is, a) the Dual-Stream Conditioning strategy that explicitly maintains a balance between spatial constraints via VAE-encoded latents and semantic phenotype guidance via UNI embeddings; b) the multi-objective loss function that contributes to sharper images with clear morphological structure; and c) the use of the Structural Correlation Metric (SCM) to focus on the core morphological structure for precise assessment of sample quality. Consequently, our model outperforms existing baselines, as demonstrated through rigorous quantitative and qualitative evaluations.

</details>


### [342] [Investigation of Automated Design of Quantum Circuits for Imaginary Time Evolution Methods Using Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07951)
*Ryo Suzuki,Shohei Watabe*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出使用深度强化学习（DDQN）自动设计变分虚时演化（VITE）量子电路，在减少门数和电路深度的同时优化能量期望值，实现了硬件开销的显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 变分虚时演化（VITE）方法在组合优化和量子化学中有应用潜力，但在NISQ设备上受到手动设计ansatz的门数和深度限制。需要自动化框架来设计更高效的量子电路。

Method: 使用双深度Q网络（DDQN）将电路构建视为多目标优化问题，同时最小化能量期望值和优化电路复杂度，并引入自适应阈值来减少硬件开销。

Result: 在Max-Cut问题中，自主发现的电路比标准硬件高效ansatz平均减少约37%的门数和43%的深度；对于H₂分子，达到了Full-CI极限，同时保持更浅的电路。

Conclusion: 深度强化学习能够发现非直观的最优电路结构，为高效的硬件感知量子算法设计提供了途径。

Abstract: Efficient ground state search is fundamental to advancing combinatorial optimization problems and quantum chemistry. While the Variational Imaginary Time Evolution (VITE) method offers a useful alternative to Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE), and Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA), its implementation on Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices is severely limited by the gate counts and depth of manually designed ansatz. Here, we present an automated framework for VITE circuit design using Double Deep-Q Networks (DDQN). Our approach treats circuit construction as a multi-objective optimization problem, simultaneously minimizing energy expectation values and optimizing circuit complexity. By introducing adoptive thresholds, we demonstrate significant hardware overhead reductions. In Max-Cut problems, our agent autonomously discovered circuits with approximately 37\% fewer gates and 43\% less depth than standard hardware-efficient ansatz on average. For molecular hydrogen ($H_2$), the DDQN also achieved the Full-CI limit, with maintaining a significantly shallower circuit. These results suggest that deep reinforcement learning can be helpful to find non-intuitive, optimal circuit structures, providing a pathway toward efficient, hardware-aware quantum algorithm design.

</details>


### [343] [Capture-Quiet Decomposition: A Verification Theorem for Chess Endgame Tablebases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07907)
*Alexander Pavlov*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了捕获-静止分解定理，用于验证国际象棋残局表基的胜-和-负标签，通过将位置分解为终局、捕获、静止三类，并建立验证条件来确保标签正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 国际象棋残局表基的胜-和-负标签验证存在循环依赖问题，传统自洽性验证可能接受平凡解（如全部标记为和棋），需要更严格的验证方法来确保标签正确性。

Method: 提出捕获-静止分解定理，将每个合法位置分为三类：终局位置、捕获位置、静止位置。验证条件包括：终局位置标签正确、捕获位置与已验证的较少棋子子模型一致、静止位置在同一残局内满足回溯一致性。

Result: 在全部35个三子和四子残局（4200万位置）、110个五子残局、372个六子残局（共517个残局）上进行了详尽验证，分解验证器与完整回溯基线在所有情况下产生相同的违规计数。

Conclusion: 捕获-静止分解定理为国际象棋残局表基的胜-和-负标签验证提供了可靠的理论基础，通过捕获位置锚定到外部验证的子模型，打破了自洽性验证的循环依赖问题。

Abstract: We present the Capture-Quiet Decomposition (CQD), a structural theorem for verifying Win-Draw-Loss (WDL) labelings of chess endgame tablebases. The theorem decomposes every legal position into exactly one of three categories -- terminal, capture, or quiet -- and shows that a WDL labeling is correct if and only if: (1) terminal positions are labeled correctly, (2) capture positions are consistent with verified sub-models of smaller piece count, and (3) quiet positions satisfy retrograde consistency within the same endgame. The key insight is that capture positions anchor the labeling to externally verified sub-models, breaking the circularity that allows trivial fixpoints (such as the all-draw labeling) to satisfy self-consistency alone. We validate CQD exhaustively on all 35 three- and four-piece endgames (42 million positions), all 110 five-piece endgames, and all 372 six-piece endgames -- 517 endgames in total -- with the decomposed verifier producing identical violation counts to a full retrograde baseline in every case.

</details>


### [344] [CMP: Robust Whole-Body Tracking for Loco-Manipulation via Competence Manifold Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07457)
*Ziyang Cheng,Haoyu Wei,Hang Yin,Xiuwei Xu,Bingyao Yu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出Competence Manifold Projection (CMP)方法，通过Frame-Wise Safety Scheme和Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator构建能力流形，使用Isomorphic Latent Space对齐流形几何与安全概率，实现对OOD输入的鲁棒防御，在保持任务性能的同时显著提升生存率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对腿式移动机械臂的全局末端执行器姿态跟踪问题，现有解耦控制方案在传感器噪声或不可行用户命令导致的分布外输入下表现脆弱。需要在不牺牲任务性能和连续性的前提下，提高对这些扰动的鲁棒性。

Method: 1. 提出Competence Manifold Projection (CMP)框架；2. 使用Frame-Wise Safety Scheme将无限时域安全约束转化为计算高效的单步流形包含问题；3. 采用Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator区分未掌握意图与训练分布；4. 引入Isomorphic Latent Space对齐流形几何与安全概率，实现O(1)复杂度的无缝防御。

Result: 在典型OOD场景中，CMP实现了高达10倍的生存率提升，而基线方法遭受灾难性失败，同时跟踪性能下降低于10%。系统展现出"尽力而为"的泛化行为，能够渐进式完成OOD目标。

Conclusion: CMP方法有效解决了腿式移动机械臂在分布外输入下的鲁棒控制问题，通过能力流形投影实现了安全与性能的平衡，为机器人控制提供了新的鲁棒性解决方案。

Abstract: While decoupled control schemes for legged mobile manipulators have shown robustness, learning holistic whole-body control policies for tracking global end-effector poses remains fragile against Out-of-Distribution (OOD) inputs induced by sensor noise or infeasible user commands. To improve robustness against these perturbations without sacrificing task performance and continuity, we propose Competence Manifold Projection (CMP). Specifically, we utilize a Frame-Wise Safety Scheme that transforms the infinite-horizon safety constraint into a computationally efficient single-step manifold inclusion. To instantiate this competence manifold, we employ a Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator that distinguishes unmastered intentions from the training distribution. We then introduce an Isomorphic Latent Space (ILS) that aligns manifold geometry with safety probability, enabling efficient O(1) seamless defense against arbitrary OOD intents. Experiments demonstrate that CMP achieves up to a 10-fold survival rate improvement in typical OOD scenarios where baselines suffer catastrophic failure, incurring under 10% tracking degradation. Notably, the system exhibits emergent ``best-effort'' generalization behaviors to progressively accomplish OOD goals by adhering to the competence boundaries. Result videos are available at: https://shepherd1226.github.io/CMP.

</details>


### [345] [The Weaponization of Computer Vision: Tracing Military-Surveillance Ties through Conference Sponsorship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07803)
*Noa Garcia,Amelia Katirai*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文调查了计算机视觉研究在军事和监控领域的应用程度，通过分析会议赞助商发现44%的赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算机视觉领域倾向于将自己定位为中立的纯技术努力，但实际已被系统性地武器化用于监控和战争。研究旨在揭示该领域研究与军事/监控应用之间的联系程度。

Method: 收集计算机视觉会议赞助商数据集，分析其与军事和监控领域的联系。通过会议赞助作为公司投资该领域并影响其发展轨迹的证据。进行两个案例研究探讨赞助作为揭示技术武器化手段的机会和局限性。

Result: 研究发现44%的计算机视觉会议赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系，揭示了该领域研究与军事化应用之间的实质性联系。

Conclusion: 计算机视觉领域需要更积极地参与关于其双重用途应用的讨论，会议赞助分析是揭示技术武器化的重要方法，但存在局限性。

Abstract: Computer vision, a core domain of artificial intelligence (AI), is the field that enables the computational analysis, understanding, and generation of visual data. Despite being historically rooted in military funding and increasingly deployed in warfare, the field tends to position itself as a neutral, purely technical endeavor, failing to engage in discussions about its dual-use applications. Yet it has been reported that computer vision systems are being systematically weaponized to assist in technologies that inflict harm, such as surveillance or warfare. Expanding on these concerns, we study the extent to which computer vision research is being used in the military and surveillance domains. We do so by collecting a dataset of tech companies with financial ties to the field's central research exchange platform: conferences. Conference sponsorship, we argue, not only serves as strong evidence of a company's investment in the field but also provides a privileged position for shaping its trajectory. By investigating sponsors' activities, we reveal that 44% of them have a direct connection with military or surveillance applications. We extend our analysis through two case studies in which we discuss the opportunities and limitations of sponsorship as a means for uncovering technological weaponization.

</details>


### [346] [QARIMA: A Quantum Approach To Classical Time Series Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08277)
*Nishikanta Mohanty,Bikash K. Behera,Badshah Mukherjee,Pravat Dash*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种量子启发的ARIMA方法，结合量子辅助滞后发现与固定配置变分量子电路进行参数估计和弱滞后优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ARIMA模型在滞后发现和参数估计中存在计算复杂度高的问题，量子计算可能提供更高效的解决方案。该研究旨在探索量子方法在时间序列分析中的实际应用价值。

Method: 1) 使用swap-test驱动的量子自相关(QACF)和量子偏自相关(QPACF)进行差分和滞后项识别；2) 固定配置的变分量子电路(VQC)用于AR和MA参数估计；3) 轻量级VQC弱滞后优化；4) 延迟矩阵构造将量子投影与时域回归器对齐

Result: 在环境和工业数据集上，通过滚动原点评估，与自动化经典ARIMA相比，报告了样本外均方误差(MSE)、平均绝对百分比误差(MAPE)以及Diebold-Mariano检验结果。七个量子贡献共同减少了元优化开销。

Conclusion: 量子方法在ARIMA模型的时间序列分析中显示出潜力，特别是在滞后发现、滞后优化和AR/MA参数估计方面，量子效应在这些环节中发挥了明确作用。

Abstract: We present a quantum-inspired ARIMA methodology that integrates quantum-assisted lag discovery with \emph{fixed-configuration} variational quantum circuits (VQCs) for parameter estimation and weak-lag refinement. Differencing and candidate lags are identified via swap-test-driven quantum autocorrelation (QACF) and quantum partial autocorrelation (QPACF), with a delayed-matrix construction that aligns quantum projections to time-domain regressors, followed by standard information-criterion parsimony. Given the screened orders $(p,d,q)$, we retain a fixed VQC ansatz, optimizer, and training budget, preventing hyperparameter leakage, and deploy the circuit in two estimation roles: VQC-AR for autoregressive coefficients and VQC-MA for moving-average coefficients. Between screening and estimation, a lightweight VQC weak-lag refinement re-weights or prunes screened AR lags without altering $(p,d,q)$. Across environmental and industrial datasets, we perform rolling-origin evaluations against automated classical ARIMA, reporting out-of-sample mean squared error (MSE), mean absolute percentage error (MAPE), and Diebold--Mariano tests on MSE and MAE. Empirically, the seven quantum contributions -- (1) differencing selection, (2) QACF, (3) QPACF, (4) swap-test primitives with delayed-matrix construction, (5) VQC-AR, (6) VQC weak-lag refinement, and (7) VQC-MA -- collectively reduce meta-optimization overhead and make explicit where quantum effects enter order discovery, lag refinement, and AR/MA parameter estimation.

</details>


### [347] [Scalable Neural Decoders for Practical Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08358)
*Andi Gu,J. Pablo Bonilla Ataides,Mikhail D. Lukin,Susanne F. Yelin*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出基于卷积神经网络的量子纠错码解码器，利用几何结构实现高速高精度解码，在Gross码上比现有解码器逻辑错误率降低17倍，吞吐量提高3-5个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子纠错码是量子计算可扩展性的关键，但需要快速准确的经典解码器来匹配量子硬件速度。当前解码算法未能充分发挥量子低密度奇偶校验码的潜力，特别是在实际应用场景中。

Method: 引入卷积神经网络解码器，利用量子纠错码的几何结构特征。该方法能够探索新的"瀑布"错误抑制机制，在适度码长下实现大规模容错算法所需的逻辑错误率。

Result: 对于[144,12,12] Gross码，解码器逻辑错误率比现有方法降低约17倍，在物理错误率p=0.1%时达到逻辑错误率~10^{-10}，吞吐量提高3-5个数量级。同时提供良好校准的置信度估计，可显著减少重复直到成功协议的时间开销。

Conclusion: 结果表明容错量子计算相关的时空成本可能显著低于先前预期，为实际量子硬件平台提供了可行的实时解码解决方案。

Abstract: Quantum error correction (QEC) is essential for scalable quantum computing. However, it requires classical decoders that are fast and accurate enough to keep pace with quantum hardware. While quantum low-density parity-check codes have recently emerged as a promising route to efficient fault tolerance, current decoding algorithms do not allow one to realize the full potential of these codes in practical settings. Here, we introduce a convolutional neural network decoder that exploits the geometric structure of QEC codes, and use it to probe a novel "waterfall" regime of error suppression, demonstrating that the logical error rates required for large-scale fault-tolerant algorithms are attainable with modest code sizes at current physical error rates, and with latencies within the real-time budgets of several leading hardware platforms. For example, for the $[144, 12, 12]$ Gross code, the decoder achieves logical error rates up to $\sim 17$x below existing decoders - reaching logical error rates $\sim 10^{-10}$ at physical error $p=0.1\%$ - with 3-5 orders of magnitude higher throughput. This decoder also produces well-calibrated confidence estimates that can significantly reduce the time overhead of repeat-until-success protocols. Taken together, these results suggest that the space-time costs associated with fault-tolerant quantum computation may be significantly lower than previously anticipated.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [348] [Benchmark Shadows: Data Alignment, Parameter Footprints, and Generalization in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07363)
*Hongjian Zou,Yidan Wang,Qi Ding,Yixuan Liao,Xiaoxin Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文研究发现，仅靠基准测试性能提升并不能全面反映大语言模型能力，数据分布对学习动态有重要影响。基准对齐数据能提高特定评估指标但限制泛化能力，而覆盖扩展数据则促进更广泛的参数适应和更好的泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型经常在基准测试中表现优异，但实际能力并未相应提升。作者假设这种差异源于数据分布导致的训练机制不同，旨在探究数据分布如何影响模型的学习动态和能力发展。

Method: 设计了受控数据干预实验，在固定训练设置下隔离分布效应。使用基于谱分析和秩分析的参数空间诊断方法，分析不同数据分布下的结构特征。研究涵盖多种开源模型家族，包括多模态模型作为关键案例研究。

Result: 发现基准对齐数据能提高狭窄评估指标但限制更广泛的表征发展，而覆盖扩展数据导致更分布式的参数适应和更好的泛化。参数空间诊断揭示了这些机制的不同结构特征。这些模式在不同模型家族中普遍存在，但并非所有数据伪影都会引起机制转变。

Conclusion: 基准测试性能不足以全面表征模型能力，数据分布在塑造学习动态中起关键作用。需要超越基准测试的评估方法来理解模型的实际能力发展。

Abstract: Large language models often achieve strong benchmark gains without corresponding improvements in broader capability. We hypothesize that this discrepancy arises from differences in training regimes induced by data distribution. To investigate this, we design controlled data interventions that isolate distributional effects under fixed training settings. We find that benchmark-aligned data improves narrow evaluation metrics while limiting broader representational development, whereas coverage-expanding data leads to more distributed parameter adaptation and better generalization. We further introduce parameter-space diagnostics based on spectral and rank analyses, which reveal distinct structural signatures of these regimes. Similar patterns are observed across diverse open-source model families, including multimodal models as a key case study, suggesting that these effects extend beyond controlled settings. A case study on prompt repetition shows that not all data artifacts induce regime shifts. These results indicate that benchmark performance alone is insufficient to characterize model capability, and highlight the importance of data distribution in shaping learning dynamics.

</details>


### [349] [Latent Structure of Affective Representations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07382)
*Benjamin J. Choi,Melanie Weber*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该研究探索了大型语言模型中情感表示的几何结构，发现LLMs学习到的情感表示与心理学中的效价-唤醒模型一致，支持线性表示假设，并可用于量化情感处理任务的不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于探索LLM潜在表示的几何结构，这对模型透明度和AI安全具有重要意义。情感处理提供了一个有趣的测试平台，因为情感既有分类组织又有连续维度，且在心理学中有成熟理论。理解这些表示对安全相关。

Method: 使用几何数据分析工具研究LLMs中情感表示的潜在结构。通过分析LLMs学习到的情感表示，验证其与心理学中广泛使用的效价-唤醒模型的一致性，并检验其几何特性。

Result: 1) LLMs学习到与心理学效价-唤醒模型一致的情感表示；2) 这些表示展现出非线性几何结构但可被线性良好近似，支持线性表示假设；3) 学习到的潜在表示空间可用于量化情感处理任务的不确定性。

Conclusion: LLMs获得的情感表示具有与人类情感模型相似的几何结构，这对模型可解释性和安全具有实际意义。研究为模型透明度方法中常用的线性表示假设提供了实证支持。

Abstract: The geometric structure of latent representations in large language models (LLMs) is an active area of research, driven in part by its implications for model transparency and AI safety. Existing literature has focused mainly on general geometric and topological properties of the learnt representations, but due to a lack of ground-truth latent geometry, validating the findings of such approaches is challenging. Emotion processing provides an intriguing testbed for probing representational geometry, as emotions exhibit both categorical organization and continuous affective dimensions, which are well-established in the psychology literature. Moreover, understanding such representations carries safety relevance. In this work, we investigate the latent structure of affective representations in LLMs using geometric data analysis tools. We present three main findings. First, we show that LLMs learn coherent latent representations of affective emotions that align with widely used valence--arousal models from psychology. Second, we find that these representations exhibit nonlinear geometric structure that can nonetheless be well-approximated linearly, providing empirical support for the linear representation hypothesis commonly assumed in model transparency methods. Third, we demonstrate that the learned latent representation space can be leveraged to quantify uncertainty in emotion processing tasks. Our findings suggest that LLMs acquire affective representations with geometric structure paralleling established models of human emotion, with practical implications for model interpretability and safety.

</details>


### [350] [Flux Attention: Context-Aware Hybrid Attention for Efficient LLMs Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07394)
*Quantong Qiu,Zhiyi Hong,Yi Yang,Haitian Wang,Kebin Liu,Qingqing Dang,Juntao Li,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Flux Attention：一种上下文感知的层级动态注意力框架，通过轻量级层路由器在FA和SA之间自适应切换，解决长上下文场景下注意力计算复杂度问题，实现性能与推理速度的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准注意力的二次计算复杂度限制了LLM在长上下文场景的可扩展性。现有混合注意力方法使用静态分配比例，无法适应不同任务的动态检索需求，且头级动态稀疏性会导致计算负载不均衡和同步延迟，阻碍硬件加速。

Method: 提出Flux Attention框架，在冻结的预训练LLM中集成轻量级层路由器，基于输入上下文自适应地将每层路由到全注意力(FA)或稀疏注意力(SA)。这种层级路由保持高保真信息检索，同时确保连续内存访问。

Result: 在多个长上下文和数学推理基准测试中，Flux Attention在性能和推理速度之间达到优越平衡，预填充和解码阶段分别实现最高2.8倍和2.0倍的速度提升。作为参数高效方法，仅需8×A800 GPU上12小时训练。

Conclusion: Flux Attention通过层级动态路由有效解决了长上下文注意力计算瓶颈，将理论计算减少转化为实际加速，为LLM在长序列处理中提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: The quadratic computational complexity of standard attention mechanisms presents a severe scalability bottleneck for LLMs in long-context scenarios. While hybrid attention mechanisms combining Full Attention (FA) and Sparse Attention (SA) offer a potential solution, existing methods typically rely on static allocation ratios that fail to accommodate the variable retrieval demands of different tasks. Furthermore, head-level dynamic sparsity often introduces severe computational load imbalance and synchronization long-tails, which hinder hardware acceleration during autoregressive decoding. To bridge this gap, we introduce Flux Attention, a context-aware framework that dynamically optimizes attention computation at the layer level. By integrating a lightweight Layer Router into frozen pretrained LLMs, the proposed method adaptively routes each layer to FA or SA based on the input context. This layer-wise routing preserves high-fidelity information retrieval while ensuring contiguous memory access, translating theoretical computational reductions into practical wall-clock speedups. As a parameter-efficient approach, our framework requires only 12 hours of training on 8$\times$A800 GPUs. Extensive experiments across multiple long-context and mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that Flux Attention achieves a superior trade-off between performance and inference speed compared with baseline models, with speed improvements of up to $2.8\times$ and $2.0\times$ in the prefill and decode stages.

</details>


### [351] [Conservation Law Breaking at the Edge of Stability: A Spectral Theory of Non-Convex Neural Network Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07405)
*Daniel Nobrega Medeiros*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 梯度下降在非凸神经网络优化中可靠找到好解的原因：梯度流保持L-1个守恒定律，将轨迹限制在低维流形；离散梯度下降中这些定律以η^α速率破坏，α≈1.1-1.6；交叉熵损失通过Hessian谱压缩自正则化漂移指数α≈1.0；存在两个动力学机制：扰动性亚EoS机制和非扰动性机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究梯度下降为何能在非凸神经网络优化中可靠找到好解，尽管最坏情况下优化问题是NP难的。探索梯度流和离散梯度下降的动力学差异，以及守恒定律的破坏机制。

Method: 分析L层ReLU网络（无偏置）的梯度流，发现保持L-1个守恒定律C_l = ||W_{l+1}||_F^2 - ||W_l||_F^2。对离散梯度下降，精确分解漂移为η^2 * S(η)，其中梯度不平衡和S(η)有闭式谱交叉公式。推导模式系数c_k ∝ e_k(0)^2 * λ_{x,k}^2。研究交叉熵损失的Hessian谱压缩动力学。

Result: 梯度流将优化轨迹限制在低维流形；离散梯度下降中守恒定律以η^α速率破坏，α≈1.1-1.6；交叉熵损失通过softmax概率集中驱动指数Hessian谱压缩，时间尺度τ=Θ(1/η)与训练集大小无关，使α自正则化到≈1.0；识别两个动力学机制：扰动性亚EoS机制（谱公式适用）和非扰动性机制（广泛模式耦合）。23个实验验证所有预测。

Conclusion: 梯度下降在神经网络优化中的成功源于梯度流的内在守恒定律和离散化导致的受控漂移。交叉熵损失通过Hessian谱压缩提供自正则化，使优化更稳定。存在宽度依赖的动力学机制转变，解释了不同训练行为。

Abstract: Why does gradient descent reliably find good solutions in non-convex neural network optimization, despite the landscape being NP-hard in the worst case? We show that gradient flow on L-layer ReLU networks without bias preserves L-1 conservation laws C_l = ||W_{l+1}||_F^2 - ||W_l||_F^2, confining trajectories to lower-dimensional manifolds. Under discrete gradient descent, these laws break with total drift scaling as eta^alpha where alpha is approximately 1.1-1.6 depending on architecture, loss function, and width. We decompose this drift exactly as eta^2 * S(eta), where the gradient imbalance sum S(eta) admits a closed-form spectral crossover formula with mode coefficients c_k proportional to e_k(0)^2 * lambda_{x,k}^2, derived from first principles and validated for both linear (R=0.85) and ReLU (R>0.80) networks. For cross-entropy loss, softmax probability concentration drives exponential Hessian spectral compression with timescale tau = Theta(1/eta) independent of training set size, explaining why cross-entropy self-regularizes the drift exponent near alpha=1.0. We identify two dynamical regimes separated by a width-dependent transition: a perturbative sub-Edge-of-Stability regime where the spectral formula applies, and a non-perturbative regime with extensive mode coupling. All predictions are validated across 23 experiments.

</details>


### [352] [Fast Heterogeneous Serving: Scalable Mixed-Scale LLM Allocation for SLO-Constrained Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07472)
*Jiaming Cheng,Duong Tung Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出两种约束感知启发式算法（GH和AGH）用于大规模LLM推理部署，解决模型选择、GPU配置、并行策略和负载分配的联合优化问题，在严格延迟、精度和预算约束下实现高效部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模LLM推理部署面临复杂挑战：需要联合选择基础模型、配置异构GPU、设计并行策略、分配工作负载，同时满足严格的延迟、精度和预算约束。传统MILP方法虽然能保证最优性但扩展性差，无法满足实际部署需求。

Method: 提出两种约束感知启发式算法：1) Greedy Heuristic (GH)：单次分配贪心算法；2) Adaptive Greedy Heuristic (AGH)：增强版GH，包含多起点构造、重定位局部搜索和GPU整合。采用三种约束感知机制：TP感知可行性选择、成本效益覆盖排名、TP升级，确保在内存、延迟、误差和预算约束下的可行性。

Result: 在Azure LLM推理跟踪（2025）校准的工作负载上，两种启发式算法都能在1秒内生成可行解，AGH接近最优成本，在大规模实例上实现超过260倍加速。在样本外压力测试中（参数膨胀达1.5倍），AGH保持可控的SLO违规和稳定成本，而精确求解器的部署质量急剧下降。

Conclusion: AGH算法为大规模LLM推理部署提供了实用高效的解决方案，在保证约束满足的同时显著优于传统MILP方法，特别适合实际生产环境中的动态变化和不确定性。

Abstract: Deploying large language model (LLM) inference at scale requires jointly selecting base models, provisioning heterogeneous GPUs, configuring parallelism, and distributing workloads under tight latency, accuracy, and budget constraints. Exact mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) approaches guarantee optimality but scale poorly. We propose two constraint-aware heuristics: a Greedy Heuristic (GH) for single-pass allocation, and an Adaptive Greedy Heuristic (AGH) that enhances GH via multi-start construction, relocate-based local search, and GPU consolidation. Three constraint-aware mechanisms -- TP-aware feasibility selection, cost-per-effective-coverage ranking, and TP upgrade -- ensure feasibility under tightly coupled memory, delay, error, and budget constraints. On workloads calibrated with the Azure LLM Inference Trace (2025), both heuristics produce feasible solutions in under one second, with AGH closely approaching optimal cost while achieving over 260x speedup on large-scale instances. Under out-of-sample stress tests with up to 1.5x parameter inflation, AGH maintains controlled SLO violations and stable cost, whereas the exact solver's placement degrades sharply.

</details>


### [353] [SYN-DIGITS: A Synthetic Control Framework for Calibrated Digital Twin Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07513)
*Grace Jiarui Fan,Chengpiao Huang,Tianyi Peng,Kaizheng Wang,Yuhang Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: SYN-DIGITS是一个轻量级校准框架，通过潜在因子模型学习数字孪生响应的潜在结构，并将其转移到人类真实数据上，以校准LLM基模拟器的预测偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM在数字孪生模拟中具有灵活性，但存在系统性偏差和校准不足的问题，限制了其在市场研究、推荐系统和社会科学中的可靠性。

Method: 受因果推断中合成控制方法的启发，提出SYN-DIGITS框架：1) 作为模型无关的后处理层；2) 开发潜在因子模型形式化校准条件；3) 支持个体和分布级模拟；4) 提供可证明的误差保证。

Result: 在13种角色构建、3个LLM和2个数据集上评估10种校准方法。SYN-DIGITS相比未校准基线：个体级相关性提升达50%，分布差异减少50-90%。

Conclusion: SYN-DIGITS为LLM基数字孪生模拟提供了原则性校准框架，显著提升预测准确性，支持未见问题和未观测人群的模拟。

Abstract: AI-based persona simulation -- often referred to as digital twin simulation -- is increasingly used for market research, recommender systems, and social sciences. Despite their flexibility, large language models (LLMs) often exhibit systematic bias and miscalibration relative to real human behavior, limiting their reliability. Inspired by synthetic control methods from causal inference, we propose SYN-DIGITS (SYNthetic Control Framework for Calibrated DIGItal Twin Simulation), a principled and lightweight calibration framework that learns latent structure from digital-twin responses and transfers it to align predictions with human ground truth. SYN-DIGITS operates as a post-processing layer on top of any LLM-based simulator and thus is model-agnostic. We develop a latent factor model that formalizes when and why calibration succeeds through latent space alignment conditions, and we systematically evaluate ten calibration methods across thirteen persona constructions, three LLMs, and two datasets. SYN-DIGITS supports both individual-level and distributional simulation for previously unseen questions and unobserved populations, with provable error guarantees. Experiments show that SYN-DIGITS achieves up to 50% relative improvements in individual-level correlation and 50--90% relative reductions in distributional discrepancy compared to uncalibrated baselines.

</details>


### [354] [Learning is Forgetting: LLM Training As Lossy Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07569)
*Henry C. Conklin,Tom Hosking,Tan Yi-Chern,Julian Gold,Jonathan D. Cohen,Thomas L. Griffiths,Max Bartolo,Seraphina Goldfarb-Tarrant*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出将大语言模型视为有损压缩实例，通过信息瓶颈理论分析其表示空间结构，发现预训练使模型接近最优压缩边界，且压缩最优性可预测下游任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型日益普及，但对其表示空间结构的理解仍然有限，这限制了我们解释其学习机制及与人类学习关联的能力。作者认为需要从信息论角度统一理解LLMs的学习过程。

Method: 将LLMs视为有损压缩实例，应用信息瓶颈理论分析模型压缩过程。通过测量不同开源权重模型的压缩特性，分析其训练数据和训练配方的差异影响，并建立压缩最优性与下游性能的关联。

Result: 预训练使模型接近序列预测的最优压缩边界（信息瓶颈界）。不同模型家族因数据和训练配方差异而压缩方式不同，但模型压缩的最优性和信息含量能广泛预测下游基准测试性能。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了统一的信息论框架来理解LLMs学习机制，将表示空间结构与模型性能直接关联，为模型分析和解释提供了可扩展的理论基础。

Abstract: Despite the increasing prevalence of large language models (LLMs), we still have a limited understanding of how their representational spaces are structured. This limits our ability to interpret how and what they learn or relate them to learning in humans. We argue LLMs are best seen as an instance of lossy compression, where over training they learn by retaining only information in their training data relevant to their objective(s). We show pre-training results in models that are optimally compressed for next-sequence prediction, approaching the Information Bottleneck bound on compression. Across an array of open weights models, each compresses differently, likely due to differences in the data and training recipes used. However even across different families of LLMs the optimality of a model's compression, and the information present in it, can predict downstream performance on across a wide array of benchmarks, letting us directly link representational structure to actionable insights about model performance. In the general case the work presented here offers a unified Information-Theoretic framing for how these models learn that is deployable at scale.

</details>


### [355] [Implicit Regularization and Generalization in Overparameterized Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07603)
*Zeran Johannsen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 该研究通过实验探究过参数化神经网络中优化动态和隐式正则化对泛化的影响，发现小批量SGD产生更平坦的极小值和更好的泛化性能，稀疏子网络仅保留10%参数仍能保持接近完整模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典统计学习理论预测过参数化模型会出现严重过拟合，但现代深度神经网络参数远超训练样本数却仍能良好泛化，这一矛盾成为机器学习核心理论问题。研究旨在通过实验探究优化动态和隐式正则化在过参数化神经网络泛化中的作用。

Method: 通过控制实验研究：不同批量大小的SGD、平坦vs尖锐极小值的几何分析（Hessian特征值估计和权重扰动分析）、NTK机制（宽网络实验）、模型规模上的双下降现象、彩票假设（迭代幅度剪枝）。所有实验使用PyTorch在CIFAR-10和MNIST上进行，采用多个随机种子。

Result: 泛化性能受网络架构、优化算法和损失景观几何的交互影响。小批量SGD产生更低的测试误差和更平坦的极小值，小批量与大批量解决方案的顶部Hessian特征值相差11.8倍，对应1.61个百分点的测试准确率提升。仅保留10%参数的稀疏子网络重新训练后性能与完整模型相差仅1.15个百分点。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明需要修订学习理论框架，以解释高维模型机制中的泛化现象，强调优化动态和隐式正则化在过参数化神经网络泛化中的关键作用。

Abstract: Classical statistical learning theory predicts that overparameterized models should exhibit severe overfitting, yet modern deep neural networks with far more parameters than training samples consistently generalize well. This contradiction has become a central theoretical question in machine learning.
  This study investigates the role of optimization dynamics and implicit regularization in enabling generalization in overparameterized neural networks through controlled experiments. We examine stochastic gradient descent (SGD) across batch sizes, the geometry of flat versus sharp minima via Hessian eigenvalue estimation and weight perturbation analysis, the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) regime through wide-network experiments, double descent across model scales, and the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis through iterative magnitude pruning. All experiments use PyTorch on CIFAR-10 and MNIST with multiple random seeds.
  Our findings demonstrate that generalization is strongly influenced by the interaction between network architecture, optimization algorithms, and loss landscape geometry. Smaller batch sizes consistently produced lower test error and flatter minima, with an 11.8x difference in top Hessian eigenvalue between small-batch and large-batch solutions corresponding to 1.61 percentage points higher test accuracy. Sparse subnetworks retaining only 10% of parameters achieved within 1.15 percentage points of full model performance when retrained from their original initialization. These results highlight the need for revised learning-theoretic frameworks capable of explaining generalization in high-dimensional model regimes.

</details>


### [356] [Guardian-as-an-Advisor: Advancing Next-Generation Guardian Models for Trustworthy LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07655)
*Yue Huang,Haomin Zhuang,Jiayi Ye,Han Bao,Yanbo Wang,Hang Hua,Siyuan Wu,Pin-Yu Chen,Xiangliang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出Guardian-as-an-Advisor (GaaA)软门控框架，通过安全顾问预测风险标签和解释，将其作为建议前置到原始查询中重新推理，减少过度拒绝，保持模型在原始规范下运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 硬门控安全检查器经常过度拒绝且与厂商模型规范不一致；现有分类法忽视鲁棒性和诚实性，导致系统在纸面上更安全但实际用处降低。

Method: 1) 构建GuardSet数据集（208k+多领域样本，包含有害/无害案例及鲁棒性/诚实性切片；2) 训练GuardAdvisor（先SFT后RL，强制标签-解释一致性）；3) GaaA管道：安全顾问预测二元风险标签+简明解释，将其作为建议前置到原始查询进行重新推理。

Result: GuardAdvisor达到竞争性检测准确率；当用于增强输入时，响应优于未增强提示；延迟研究显示顾问推理使用不到基础模型计算的5%，在现实有害输入率下仅增加2-10%端到端开销。

Conclusion: GaaA引导模型遵守模型规范，在保持安全性的同时减少过度拒绝，实现更平衡的安全-实用性权衡。

Abstract: Hard-gated safety checkers often over-refuse and misalign with a vendor's model spec; prevailing taxonomies also neglect robustness and honesty, yielding safer-on-paper yet less useful systems. This work introduces Guardian-as-an-Advisor (GaaA), a soft-gating pipeline where a guardian predicts a binary risk label plus a concise explanation and prepends this advice to the original query for re-inference, keeping the base model operating under its original spec. To support training and evaluation, GuardSet is constructed, a 208k+ multi-domain dataset unifying harmful and harmless cases with targeted robustness and honesty slices. GuardAdvisor is trained via SFT followed by RL to enforce label-explanation consistency. GuardAdvisor attains competitive detection accuracy while enabling the advisory workflow; when used to augment inputs, responses improve over unaugmented prompts. A latency study shows advisor inference uses below 5% of base-model compute and adds only 2-10% end-to-end overhead under realistic harmful-input rates. Overall, GaaA steers models to comply with the model spec, maintaining safety while reducing over-refusal.

</details>


### [357] [Optimal Decay Spectra for Linear Recurrences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07658)
*Yang Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: PoST框架通过谱重参数化和位置自适应缩放解决线性循环模型的长程记忆问题，在多种架构上实现零样本语言建模改进和长上下文检索提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性循环模型虽然具有线性时间序列处理能力，但在长程记忆方面表现不佳。作者发现问题的根源在于衰减谱：随机初始化导致最小谱隙坍缩为O(N^{-2})，产生次指数误差；线性间距虽避免坍缩但性能退化为exp(-O(N/√T))，在长上下文上实际为代数衰减。

Method: 提出位置自适应谱锥化(PoST)框架，包含两个机制：1) 谱重参数化：结构性地强制几何间距的对数衰减率，证明达到最小最大最优速率O(exp(-cN/log T))；2) 位置自适应缩放：通过将谱拉伸到实际依赖范围，消除静态谱的尺度不匹配问题，将速率提升到O(exp(-cN/log t))。该框架可集成到任何对角线性循环中而无额外开销。

Result: 在Mamba-2、RWKV-7、Gated DeltaNet、Gated Linear Attention和RetNet等架构上实例化PoST。在180M-440M规模的预训练中，显示一致的零样本语言建模改进，Mamba-2在长上下文检索任务(MQAR和NIAH)上获得显著提升，其他架构也表现出竞争性或改进的性能。

Conclusion: PoST框架通过理论保证的谱优化机制，有效解决了线性循环模型的长程记忆限制，为多种序列建模架构提供了通用的性能提升方案，特别是在长上下文处理方面表现出色。

Abstract: Linear recurrent models offer linear-time sequence processing but often suffer from suboptimal long-range memory. We trace this to the decay spectrum: for $N$ channels, random initialization collapses the minimum spectral gap to $O(N^{-2})$, yielding sub-exponential error $\exp(-Ω(N/\log N))$; linear spacing avoids collapse but degrades to $\exp(-O(N/\sqrt{T}))$, practically algebraic over long contexts. We introduce Position-Adaptive Spectral Tapering (PoST), an architecture-agnostic framework combining two mechanisms: (1) Spectral Reparameterization, which structurally enforces geometrically spaced log-decay rates, proven minimax optimal at rate $O(\exp(-cN/\log T))$; and (2) Position-Adaptive Scaling, the provably unique mechanism that eliminates the scale mismatch of static spectra (where only $N\log t/\log T$ of $N$ channels are effective at position $t$) by stretching the spectrum to the actual dependency range, sharpening the rate to $O(\exp(-cN/\log t))$. This scaling natively induces fractional invariance: the impulse response becomes scale-free, with channels interpolating between relative and absolute temporal coordinates. PoST integrates into any diagonal linear recurrence without overhead. We instantiate it across Mamba-2, RWKV-7, Gated DeltaNet, Gated Linear Attention, and RetNet. Pre-training at 180M-440M scales shows consistent zero-shot language modeling improvements, significant long-context retrieval gains for Mamba-2 (MQAR and NIAH), and competitive or improved performance across other architectures. Code: https://github.com/SiLifen/PoST.

</details>


### [358] [SAGE: Sign-Adaptive Gradient for Memory-Efficient LLM Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07663)
*Wooin Lee,Hyun-Tae Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: SAGE是一种新型优化器，解决了AdamW在LLM预训练中的内存瓶颈问题，特别是针对嵌入层的稀疏高方差梯度问题，通过结合Lion风格更新方向和内存高效的O(d)自适应尺度，在减少优化器状态内存的同时实现了更好的收敛效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AdamW优化器在LLM预训练中是标准选择，但它消耗相当于模型两倍大小的优化器状态内存，成为关键的内存瓶颈。现有的轻状态优化器（如SinkGD）无法有效处理嵌入层特有的稀疏、高方差梯度问题，导致需要混合设计（部分使用AdamW），从而部分抵消了内存增益。

Method: 提出SAGE（Sign Adaptive GradiEnt）优化器，结合了Lion风格的更新方向和新的内存高效O(d)自适应尺度。这个尺度作为"安全阻尼器"，理论上被限制在1.0以内，能更有效地抑制高方差维度。SAGE在混合结构中替代AdamW，专门解决嵌入层梯度问题。

Result: 在Llama模型（最大1.3B参数）上，基于SAGE的混合优化器实现了新的最先进困惑度，超越了所有基线方法（包括SinkGD混合），同时显著减少了优化器状态内存消耗。

Conclusion: SAGE成功解决了嵌入层困境，在保持内存效率的同时实现了更好的收敛性能，为LLM预训练提供了更优的优化器选择。

Abstract: The AdamW optimizer, while standard for LLM pretraining, is a critical memory bottleneck, consuming optimizer states equivalent to twice the model's size. Although light-state optimizers like SinkGD attempt to address this issue, we identify the embedding layer dilemma: these methods fail to handle the sparse, high-variance gradients inherent to embeddings, forcing a hybrid design that reverts to AdamW and partially negates the memory gains. We propose SAGE (Sign Adaptive GradiEnt), a novel optimizer that resolves this dilemma by replacing AdamW in this hybrid structure. SAGE combines a Lion-style update direction with a new, memory-efficient $O(d)$ adaptive scale. This scale acts as a "safe damper," provably bounded by 1.0, which tames high-variance dimensions more effectively than existing methods. This superior stability allows SAGE to achieve better convergence. On Llama models up to 1.3B parameters, our SAGE-based hybrid achieves new state-of-the-art perplexity, outperforming all baselines, including SinkGD hybrid, while significantly reducing optimizer state memory.

</details>


### [359] [An Imperfect Verifier is Good Enough: Learning with Noisy Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07666)
*Andreas Plesner,Francisco Guzmán,Anish Athalye*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: RLVR对验证噪声具有鲁棒性：在代码生成和科学推理任务中，即使验证器错误率高达15%，模型验证准确率与干净基线相差不到2个百分点


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究RLVR对验证噪声的鲁棒性，解决验证器不完美时RL训练的有效性问题，为实际应用提供指导

Method: 在代码生成和科学推理任务中引入噪声到RL训练，测试不同噪声率（最高15%）的影响，使用三种模型家族（Qwen3、GLM4、Llama 3.1）和4B-9B规模模型

Result: 噪声率高达15%时，验证准确率与干净基线相差不到2个百分点；结果在不同噪声类型、模型家族和规模中一致；不完美的验证不是RLVR的根本障碍

Conclusion: RLVR对验证噪声具有显著鲁棒性，实践者应优先考虑中等准确率但高精度的验证，而非追求完美验证

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a prominent method for post-training Large Language Models (LLMs). However, verifiers are rarely error-free; even deterministic checks can be inaccurate, and the growing dependence on model-based judges exacerbates the issue. The extent to which RLVR is robust to such noise and the verifier accuracy required for effective training remain unresolved questions. We investigate these questions in the domains of code generation and scientific reasoning by introducing noise into RL training. Noise rates up to 15% yield peak validation accuracy within 2 percentage points of the clean baseline. These findings are consistent across controlled and model-based noise types, three model families (Qwen3, GLM4, Llama 3.1), and model sizes from 4B to 9B. Overall, the results indicate that imperfect verification does not constitute a fundamental barrier to RLVR. Furthermore, our findings suggest that practitioners should prioritize moderate accuracy with high precision over perfect verification.

</details>


### [360] [Tree-of-Evidence: Efficient "System 2" Search for Faithful Multimodal Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07692)
*Micky C. Nnamdi,Benoit L. Marteau,Yishan Zhong,J. Ben Tamo,May D. Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: ToE是一种用于大型多模态模型的推理时搜索算法，通过离散优化问题实现可解释性，使用轻量级证据瓶颈对数据组进行评分，并通过束搜索找到支持预测的紧凑证据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型多模态模型在医疗等高风险领域表现出色，但其推理过程不透明。现有的可解释性方法（如注意力机制或事后显著性分析）往往无法忠实反映模型的决策过程，特别是在整合时间序列和文本等异构模态时。

Method: 提出Tree-of-Evidence（ToE）推理时搜索算法，将可解释性构建为离散优化问题。使用轻量级证据瓶颈对数据组（如生命体征窗口、报告句子）进行评分，通过束搜索识别能够复现模型预测的最小证据集。

Result: 在三个数据集六个任务上的评估显示：ToE在保持预测性能的同时生成可审计的证据轨迹，在所有设置中仅使用五个证据单元即可保留超过0.98的完整模型AUROC。在稀疏证据预算下，ToE比其他方法具有更高的决策一致性和更低的概率保真度误差。

Conclusion: ToE为审计多模态模型提供了实用机制，通过揭示支持每个预测的离散证据单元，能够适应性地调整搜索策略：简单案例仅使用生命体征，而生理信号模糊时则选择性地整合文本。

Abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) achieve state-of-the-art performance in high-stakes domains like healthcare, yet their reasoning remains opaque. Current interpretability methods, such as attention mechanisms or post-hoc saliency, often fail to faithfully represent the model's decision-making process, particularly when integrating heterogeneous modalities like time-series and text. We introduce Tree-of-Evidence (ToE), an inference-time search algorithm that frames interpretability as a discrete optimization problem. Rather than relying on soft attention weights, ToE employs lightweight Evidence Bottlenecks that score coarse groups or units of data (e.g., vital-sign windows, report sentences) and performs a beam search to identify the compact evidence set required to reproduce the model's prediction. We evaluate ToE across six tasks spanning three datasets and two domains: four clinical prediction tasks on MIMIC-IV, cross-center validation on eICU, and non-clinical fault detection on LEMMA-RCA. ToE produces auditable evidence traces while maintaining predictive performance, retaining over 0.98 of full-model AUROC with as few as five evidence units across all settings. Under sparse evidence budgets, ToE achieves higher decision agreement and lower probability fidelity error than other approaches. Qualitative analyses show that ToE adapts its search strategy: it often resolves straightforward cases using only vitals, while selectively incorporating text when physiological signals are ambiguous. ToE therefore provides a practical mechanism for auditing multimodal models by revealing which discrete evidence units support each prediction.

</details>


### [361] [MIPT-SSM: Scaling Language Models with $O(1)$ Inference Cache via Phase Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07716)
*Yasong Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: MIPT-SSM是一种基于测量诱导相变物理原理的神经序列架构，通过可学习的测量率在波相和粒子相之间路由计算，在长序列任务上显著优于Transformer，内存效率提升42.8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统Transformer在处理长序列时面临O(N)内存开销的挑战，而现有方法难以同时实现分布式信息传播和精确局部存储。MIPT-SSM旨在通过物理启发的相变机制解决这一根本矛盾。

Method: 基于测量诱导相变理论，设计可学习测量率p_t在波相（分布式复杂相位干涉）和粒子相（状态坍缩到当前token）之间动态路由。引入因果稀疏KV缓存，在N=1024处预测相变。

Result: 在AG News分类任务上准确率0.905 vs Transformer 0.736（+16.6%）；N=8192时内存810MB vs 34,651MB（42.8倍减少）；精确召回任务准确率0.968；语言建模PPL 92.1 vs 90.5（差距1.8%）。

Conclusion: MIPT-SSM通过物理启发的相变机制成功解决了序列建模中分布式传播与局部存储的矛盾，在保持性能的同时大幅降低内存开销，为高效长序列处理提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present MIPT-SSM, a neural sequence architecture built on the physics of Measurement-Induced Phase Transitions (MIPT). The central idea is a learned measurement rate $p_{t}\in(0,1)$ that routes computation between two regimes: wave phase $(p_{t}\rightarrow0)$, where information propagates as distributed complex-phase interference; and particle phase $(p_{t}\rightarrow1)$ where the state collapses onto the current token, enabling precise local storage. These two regimes are provably incompatible in a single linear operator one of the few "no-go theorems" in sequence modeling and $p_{t}$ is our way around it. The model is predicted to exhibit a phase transition at critical sequence length $N^{*}\approx1024$, where the information density ratio $N/D$ crosses unity, consistent with our memory scaling observations. On AG News (four-class classification), MIPT achieves 0.905 accuracy versus Transformer's 0.736 (+16.6%), stable across 3 seeds. At $N=8192$ MIPT requires 810 MB versus Transformer's 34,651 MB a 42.8x memory reduction. On exact-recall ("needle-in-a-haystack"), our causal sparse KV cache achieves 0.968 accuracy. Remarkably, under unbounded cache capacity, the $p_{t}$ gate autonomously learns to store only the single critical token (averaging $1.0/512$ slots used), filtering out all noise and achieving a 99.8% sparsity rate. On language modeling (WikiText-103, 31M parameters), MIPT-LM with $K=64$ cache reaches PPL 92.1 versus Transformer's 90.5 (gap: 1.8%) while inference KV cache shrinks from $O(N)$ to $O(64)$.

</details>


### [362] [Structured Distillation of Web Agent Capabilities Enables Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07776)
*Xing Han Lù,Siva Reddy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Agent-as-Annotators框架使用前沿LLM作为教师生成合成轨迹，通过监督学习训练本地可部署的9B参数Web代理，在WebArena上超越闭源模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿LLM虽然能导航复杂网站，但成本高且依赖第三方API，难以本地部署。需要开发本地可部署的高性能Web代理

Method: 提出Agent-as-Annotators框架，将人类标注角色（任务设计师、标注员、监督员）模块化为LLM组件。使用Gemini 3 Pro作为教师生成3,000条轨迹，经过质量筛选后，用2,322条轨迹通过纯监督学习微调9B参数学生模型

Result: 在WebArena上达到41.5%，超越Claude 3.5 Sonnet（36.0%）和GPT-4o（31.5%），几乎是之前最佳开源结果（Go-Browse，21.7%）的两倍。在未见过的WorkArena L1上提升18.2个百分点，在其他三个基准测试上也有持续改进

Conclusion: 结构化轨迹合成从单一前沿教师模型足以产生有竞争力的本地可部署Web代理。每个管道组件都有重要贡献，法官过滤、评估提示和推理轨迹都带来可测量的增益

Abstract: Frontier LLMs can navigate complex websites, but their cost and reliance on third-party APIs make local deployment impractical. We introduce Agent-as-Annotators, a framework that structures synthetic trajectory generation for web agents by analogy to human annotation roles, replacing the Task Designer, Annotator, and Supervisor with modular LLM components. Using Gemini 3 Pro as teacher, we generate 3,000 trajectories across six web environments and fine-tune a 9B-parameter student with pure supervised learning on the 2,322 that pass quality filtering. The resulting model achieves 41.5% on WebArena, surpassing closed-source models such as Claude 3.5 Sonnet (36.0%) and GPT-4o (31.5%) under the same evaluation protocol, and nearly doubling the previous best open-weight result (Go-Browse, 21.7%). Capabilities transfer to unseen environments, with an 18.2 percentage point gain on WorkArena L1 (an enterprise platform never seen during training) and consistent improvements across three additional benchmarks. Ablations confirm that each pipeline component contributes meaningfully, with Judge filtering, evaluation hints, and reasoning traces each accounting for measurable gains. These results demonstrate that structured trajectory synthesis from a single frontier teacher is sufficient to produce competitive, locally deployable web agents. Project page: https://agent-as-annotators.github.io

</details>


### [363] [PolicyLong: Towards On-Policy Context Extension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07809)
*Junlong Jia,Ziyang Chen,Xing Wu,Chaochen Gao,TingHao Yu,Feng Zhang,Songlin Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: PolicyLong：一种动态在线策略数据筛选方法，通过迭代使用当前模型重新执行熵计算、检索和验证，确保训练分布与模型演化能力对齐，解决长上下文数据合成中的离线策略差距问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展LLM上下文窗口受限于高质量长上下文数据的稀缺。现有基于信息论验证的方法采用单次离线构建，使用固定基础模型，导致训练分布与模型演化能力不匹配的根本性离线策略差距。

Method: 提出PolicyLong方法，将数据构建转向动态在线策略范式。迭代地使用当前模型重新执行数据筛选（熵计算、检索和验证），确保训练分布跟踪演化能力，形成自发的自课程学习。关键点：正例和困难负例上下文都来自当前模型的熵景观，共同演化模型学习利用和抵抗的内容。

Result: 在RULER、HELMET和LongBench-v2（Qwen2.5-3B）上的实验显示，PolicyLong始终优于EntropyLong和NExtLong方法，在更长上下文长度上增益更大（如在RULER 128K上+2.54），证实了在线策略数据演化的价值。

Conclusion: 动态在线策略数据筛选能有效解决长上下文数据合成中的离线策略差距问题，通过使训练分布与模型演化能力对齐，显著提升长上下文扩展性能。

Abstract: Extending LLM context windows is hindered by scarce high-quality long-context data. Recent methods synthesize data with genuine long-range dependencies via information-theoretic verification, selecting contexts that reduce a base model's predictive entropy. However, their single-pass offline construction with a fixed model creates a fundamental off-policy gap: the static screening landscape misaligns with the model's evolving capabilities, causing the training distribution to drift. We propose PolicyLong, shifting data construction towards a dynamic on-policy paradigm. By iteratively re-executing data screening (entropy computation, retrieval, and verification) using the current model, PolicyLong ensures the training distribution tracks evolving capabilities, yielding an emergent self-curriculum. Crucially, both positive and hard negative contexts derive from the current model's entropy landscape, co-evolving what the model learns to exploit and resist. Experiments on RULER, HELMET, and LongBench-v2 (Qwen2.5-3B) show PolicyLong consistently outperforms EntropyLong and NExtLong, with gains growing at longer contexts (e.g., +2.54 at 128K on RULER), confirming the value of on-policy data evolution.

</details>


### [364] [QaRL: Rollout-Aligned Quantization-Aware RL for Fast and Stable Training under Training--Inference Mismatch](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07853)
*Hao Gu,Hao Wang,Jiacheng Liu,Lujun Li,Qiyuan Zhu,Bei Liu,Binxing Xu,Lei Wang,Xintong Yang,Sida Lin,Sirui Han,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出QaRL（量化感知强化学习）和TBPO（信任带策略优化），解决LLM RL训练中量化rollout导致的训练-推理不匹配问题，在数学问题上提升性能并保持低比特吞吐优势


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型强化学习流水线通常受限于rollout生成速度，现有量化加速方法会扩大训练-推理差距，导致优化不稳定，需要解决量化rollout中的训练不匹配问题

Method: 1. QaRL：对齐训练侧前向传播与量化rollout以最小化不匹配；2. TBPO：序列级目标函数，采用双重裁剪处理负样本，将更新保持在信任区域内

Result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B MoE数学问题上，QaRL比量化rollout训练提升+5.5分，同时提高稳定性并保持低比特吞吐优势

Conclusion: QaRL和TBPO有效解决了量化rollout中的训练-推理不匹配问题，在保持加速优势的同时提升了RL训练的性能和稳定性

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines are often bottlenecked by rollout generation, making end-to-end training slow. Recent work mitigates this by running rollouts with quantization to accelerate decoding, which is the most expensive stage of the RL loop. However, these setups destabilize optimization by amplifying the training-inference gap: rollouts are operated at low precision, while learning updates are computed at full precision. To address this challenge, we propose QaRL (Rollout Alignment Quantization-Aware RL), which aligns training-side forward with the quantized rollout to minimize mismatch. We further identify a failure mode in quantized rollouts: long-form responses tend to produce repetitive, garbled tokens (error tokens). To mitigate these problems, we introduce TBPO (Trust-Band Policy Optimization), a sequence-level objective with dual clipping for negative samples, aimed at keeping updates within the trust region. On Qwen3-30B-A3B MoE for math problems, QaRL outperforms quantized-rollout training by +5.5 while improving stability and preserving low-bit throughput benefits.

</details>


### [365] [Bit-by-Bit: Progressive QAT Strategy with Outlier Channel Splitting for Stable Low-Bit LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07888)
*Binxing Xu,Hao Gu,Lujun Li,Hao Wang,Bei Liu,Jiacheng Liu,Qiyuan Zhu,Xintong Yang,Chao Li,Sirui Han,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Bit-by-Bit：一种渐进式量化感知训练框架，通过块级渐进训练、整数量化网格嵌套结构和异常通道分割，实现超低精度（2位权重/2位激活）LLM训练，在保持性能的同时获得显著加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超低精度训练LLM面临收敛不稳定和训练成本高的问题，主要由于异常通道的重尾分布和跨层误差累积。现有量化方法难以在极低比特下保持模型性能。

Method: 1) 块级渐进训练：分阶段降低精度，为低比特优化提供稳定初始化；2) 整数量化网格嵌套结构：支持"训练一次，部署任意精度"；3) 舍入感知异常通道分割：减少量化误差同时保持量化输出不变；4) 采用E4M3缩放和自定义2位算子。

Result: 在W2A2设置下，Bit-by-Bit显著优于BitDistiller和EfficientQAT等基线方法，在Llama2/3上仅产生2.25 WikiText2 PPL损失（相比全精度模型），同时实现高达11倍于BF16的加速。

Conclusion: Bit-by-Bit框架成功解决了超低精度LLM训练的挑战，通过渐进式方法和异常通道分割技术，在保持模型性能的同时实现了显著的推理加速，为高效LLM部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Training LLMs at ultra-low precision remains a formidable challenge. Direct low-bit QAT often suffers from convergence instability and substantial training costs, exacerbated by quantization noise from heavy-tailed outlier channels and error accumulation across layers. To address these issues, we present Bit-by-Bit, a progressive QAT framework with outlier channel splitting. Our approach integrates three key components: (1) block-wise progressive training that reduces precision stage by stage, ensuring stable initialization for low-bit optimization; (2) nested structure of integer quantization grids to enable a "train once, deploy any precision" paradigm, allowing a single model to support multiple bit-widths without retraining; (3) rounding-aware outlier channel splitting, which mitigates quantization error while acting as an identity transform that preserves the quantized outputs. Furthermore, we follow microscaling groups with E4M3 scales, capturing dynamic activation ranges in alignment with OCP/NVIDIA standards. To address the lack of efficient 2-bit kernels, we developed custom operators for both W2A2 and W2A16 configurations, achieving up to 11$\times$ speedup over BF16. Under W2A2 settings, Bit-by-Bit significantly outperforms baselines like BitDistiller and EfficientQAT on both Llama2/3, achieving a loss of only 2.25 WikiText2 PPL compared to full-precision models.

</details>


### [366] [Sinkhorn doubly stochastic attention rank decay analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07925)
*Michela Lapenna,Rita Fioresi,Bahman Gharesifard*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文研究了自注意力机制中的秩崩溃问题，发现使用Sinkhorn归一化的双随机注意力矩阵比标准Softmax行随机注意力能更有效地保持秩，并推导了理论界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Transformer中的行随机注意力机制存在信号退化问题，包括秩崩溃（导致token表示越来越均匀）和熵崩溃（注意力分布高度集中）。最近研究表明双随机注意力作为熵正则化形式能改善性能，但需要更深入理解其秩保持特性。

Method: 使用Sinkhorn算法归一化的双随机注意力矩阵，分析其在网络深度中的秩崩溃现象。理论推导了纯自注意力使用Sinkhorn归一化时的秩衰减界限，并通过情感分析和图像分类任务进行实证验证。

Result: 双随机注意力矩阵比标准Softmax行随机注意力能更有效地保持秩。理论分析表明，使用Sinkhorn归一化时，秩会以双指数速度衰减到1（与Softmax类似）。跳跃连接对缓解秩崩溃至关重要。

Conclusion: 双随机注意力通过Sinkhorn归一化能更好地保持秩，但仍会经历双指数秩衰减。跳跃连接是缓解秩崩溃的关键机制。这为改进Transformer架构设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: The self-attention mechanism is central to the success of Transformer architectures. However, standard row-stochastic attention has been shown to suffer from significant signal degradation across layers.
